title: Tiles Survive!
notes:
[What's New]
- The Wall of Honor System: Celebrate your Heroes' achievements and unlock a brand-new progression path for fully upgraded SSR Heroes!
1. Access: Once a Hero reaches 10-Star, their Wall of Honor can be unlocked through the Hero Academy.
2. Core Progression: 10-Star Heroes are displayed by faction (Stalwart, Aeronaut, Rover, and Mariner). Spend Hero Fragments and Hero EXP to increase their Honor Level. Each Honor Level grants permanent Power bonuses.

title: Slotomania™ Slots Machine Game
notes: Hi Slotomania Fans! Great news! We’ve packed the game with tons of exciting upgrades that will make your Slotomania experience smoother, richer, and more thrilling than ever. New slots are always on the way, and your favorite classics are right here waiting for you. Enjoy bigger wins, faster and smoother gameplay, exciting new features, and incredible quests. It’s the Slotomania you love-only better! Have fun and good luck!

title: Love and Deepspace
notes:
Version 5.0 of Love and Deepspace [Throne of Eros] Is Now Released!

[New 5-Star Memories]
-Before a dominant will, even the cosmos bows. The limited Wish Pool [Throne of Eros] is now available with the new Memory series. You can obtain limited-time pulls, Memory-themed Outfits, and selectable event-limited 5-Star Memories.
-Participate in the [Illusia Locus] event, and use the Kindling Guide to claim five new 4-Star Memories for free!
